an5.36:1.4: One gives to one going away.
an5.36:1.5: One gives to one who is ill.
an5.36:1.6: One gives in time of famine.
an5.36:1.7: One sets the first fruits of field & orchard in front of those who are virtuous.
an5.36:1.8: These are the five seasonable gifts.”
an5.36:2.1: In the proper season they give—
an5.36:2.4: Having been given in proper season,
an5.36:3.1: with hearts inspired by the noble ones
an5.36:3.3: Those who rejoice in that gift
an5.36:3.5: they, too, have a share of the merit,
an5.36:3.6: and the offering isn’t depleted by that.
an5.36:4.2: one should give where the gift bears great fruit.
an5.36:4.4: living beings in the next life.
